features: TRAVEL HAIR DRYER – This lightweight & compact professional style travel hair dryer will deliver you fast and efficient hair styling when away on holiday or on long weekends away with friends and family. It comes in a classic black colour.

PERFECT FOR TRAVEL – The hair dryer features a dual-voltage functionality that allows you to easily switch between 120V & 240V, all depending on which country you are in. The unit also features a folding handle which will allow you to easily fit it into suitcases and overnight bags.

PROFESSIONAL STYLING – The professional hair dryer will allow you to style your hair in a multitude of ways thanks to the 2 individual heat & speed settings, whilst the removable nozzle allows you to control the air flow to your hair.

CONVENIENT & SAFE – This portable hair dryer features a 1.8-metre power cable that allows you to sit away from the plug socket and in front of a mirror when styling your hair. The device also comes complete with a safety hanging loop which allows you to let it cool before putting it away again.
RED HOT - Red Hot Professional is the go-to brand for all your hairstyling needs. Visit the Red Hot store page on Amazon today to view the entire range.
description: Product Description Previous page Travel Friendly Designs Choose between various models, including a foldable hairdryer ideal for travel. Style Your Way Select from adjustable speed settings and heat levels available. Attachments Included Various attachments are included for easy control over your hair styling. Extra Features Each hairdryer is dual-voltage and features easy-grip handles plus a hanging loop for convenience. 2 Colours The hairdryers come in 2 colours, red or black.
